## edu-cli phase-plan edit

Update a phase plan (更新阶段性计划)

```
edu-cli phase-plan edit [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --end-date string     New end date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  -h, --help                help for edit
      --id uint             Phase plan ID (required)
      --sort-order int      New sort order
      --start-date string   New start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
      --title string        New title
```
